nasb.text: and the grace of our Lord was more than abundant, with the faith and love which are found in Christ Jesus.

esv.text: and the grace of our Lord overflowed for me with the faith and love that are in Christ Jesus.

cnv.text: 我們主的恩典，隨著在基督耶穌裡的信心和愛心，在我身上越發增加。

ccb.text: 主赐给我丰富的恩典，使我在基督耶稣里有信心和爱心。

csbs.text: 而且我们主的恩典，随着在基督耶稣里的信心和爱心，格外增多。
